_comment: Claude Code hooks. Copy to .claude/hooks.json (or merge into .claude/settings.json). See templates/hooks/README.md for rollout and effectiveness notes. Schema: each hook matcher has a nested 'hooks' array of {type,command} objects — verified against Claude Code CLI v2.1+.
